allow: Bash(git config --global user.name && git config --global user.email)
Bash(npm create astro@latest web-recursos -- --template minimal --no-install --no-git --typescript strict)

Bash(git init && git add . && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: create Uber blog with Astro

Complete blog about Uber with all required sections:
- Home: header, gallery, video, slider, contact form, Google Maps
- Menu pages: Características, Tarifas, Registro, Usuarios, Opinión
- Blog: 2 categories \(Novedades, Tecnología\) with 2 articles each

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
